guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 17. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ing: Point to the big ING and say: inging. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ay: Now point to the big AY and say: ayayay.

parent_story: The king played in the clay. A bird sang a sweet song for him today.
